tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and imagine Jesus responding to John's disciples with compassion, demonstrating His divine authority through miraculous signs of healing and restoration

two_step.reflect_question: How do I respond when my expectations of God's work don't match His actual plan?

options.text: Trust His wisdom over my understanding
options.response: Spend time in prayer surrendering my expectations

options.text: Seek clarity through Scripture and wise counsel
options.response: Journal and discuss with a spiritual mentor

options.text: Remain open to unexpected ways God might work
options.response: Practice flexibility and humility in my spiritual journey

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw Jesus extending an invitation of 'rest' - show what emotional and spiritual rest looks like visually

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter changed my understanding of Jesus' mission and compassion?
options: Jesus is more gentle and understanding than I previously thought
God's work often looks different from human expectations
True spiritual rest comes through connection with Christ
Jesus values humble faith over religious performance

three_choice.question: Which aspect of Jesus' message most challenges your understanding?

choices.expansion: Jesus demonstrates messianic identity through tangible, compassionate actions that restore human dignity.

choices.text: The Complexity of Faith and Doubt
choices.expansion: John's questioning reveals that spiritual uncertainty can coexist with profound devotion.
Divine truth is simultaneously hidden from the 'wise' and revealed to the spiritually humble.

socratic_nudge.question: If miracles do not automatically produce faith, what truly transforms human hearts?

moral_slider.question: How do you reconcile divine power with apparent human limitation?

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter reshaped your understanding of spiritual journey?

thematic_summaries.title: Divine Authentication of Messianic Mission
thematic_summaries.summary: Jesus responds to John's disciples by demonstrating His messianic credentials through miraculous signs. His works validate His identity as the prophesied Messiah, fulfilling Isaiah's prophetic descriptions of divine healing and restoration.

thematic_summaries.title: Spiritual Receptivity and Judgment
thematic_summaries.summary: Jesus critiques the spiritual dullness of cities that witnessed His miracles yet remained unrepentant. He reveals that divine revelation is sovereignly given and that moral response to spiritual truth determines eternal outcomes.

reevaluation.question: How should we understand divine revelation and human spiritual responsiveness?
options: Revelation is entirely dependent on human intellectual capacity
God sovereignly reveals Himself, but humans retain free will to respond
Spiritual understanding is predetermined without human agency
Divine revelation is universally accessible regardless of individual spiritual condition
